intro: Ventenata eigiana, also known as Eig's ventenata, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Ventenata eigiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties.
